name: @mf/pet
description: Reusable MF forest pet assets and vanilla JS component.

scripts.extract:all: python tools/extract_status_gif.py doubt && python tools/extract_status_gif.py move && python tools/extract_status_gif.py rest && python tools/extract_status_gif.py sad && python tools/extract_status_gif.py work && python tools/extract_status_gif.py idle && python tools/extract_status_gif.py watering
